final_message:
All 6 tests pass. Two bugs fixed in `lrucache/cache.py`:

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** — hits left entries at their old position in the `OrderedDict`, so a recently-read key could still be evicted as LRU. Added `move_to_end(key)` on hit.
2. **`put` evicted even when updating an existing key** — the capacity check ran before checking membership, so updating a key in a full cache needlessly evicted the LRU entry. Now eviction only happens when inserting a *new* key at capacity.

`SOLUTION.md` written with the details.
